heroText: We help international clients buy, renovate, restore and maintain property in Italy with one coordinated team and one clear process.
servicesTitle: Dedicated service pages built for clarity and SEO.
faqTitle: Answers for buyers, owners and investors.
callDesc: Share your property details, preferred time, and project scope.
service3: Buy and Renovate Property in Italy
homeIntro: LuxuryItaly is a turnkey partner for premium homes, heritage buildings and investment properties across Italy. We combine local expertise, architectural sensitivity and clear communication for clients based abroad.
servicesIntro: Each service page explains who the service is for, what is included, and how the project is managed from first conversation to final handover.
portfolioIntro: Drag the slider to compare before and after conditions across featured projects in Amalfi, Umbria, Argentario, Rome, Tuscany and Lake Como.
aboutIntro: We work with qualified architects and geometricians, align documentation with local requirements, and deliver a calm, professional process from discovery to completion.
faqIntro: These answers address the most common questions international clients ask before buying, renovating or maintaining property in Italy.
